name: Chicken Mix
recipeInstructions:
If using whole chickens, cut into quarters.
Combine all ingredients in a large pot or Dutch oven. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer until the chicken is tender, approximately 1.5 hours for bone-in pieces and less time for boneless breasts. Remove from heat and strain broth through a fine mesh strainer into a clean container, allowing it to cool slightly.
Discard bones and skin; dice or shred the meat. Divide into six one-pint freezer containers, leaving about an inch of headspace at the top of each. Seal lids securely and label with date and contents. Freeze for up to 3 months.
Transfer strained broth to six additional one-pint containers, maintaining the same headspace and labeling before freezing for up to 3 months.
Makes 6 pints of Chicken Mix and 6 pints of Chicken Broth.
